title: Survivor Mark Contract Schema
description: Schema for validating hidden survivor mark definitions.

survivor_mark_id.description: Unique identifier for this survivor mark instance.

floor_id.description: The ID of the floor where this mark is placed.

source_mutation_event_id.description: The ID of the mutation event that placed this mark.

mark_class_id.description: The class of survivor mark (e.g., visual, audio).

hint_modes.description: List of discoverability modes for this mark (e.g., visual_hint, lighting_reveal).

placement_context.description: Textual description of where and how the mark is integrated into the environment.

claim_condition.description: Description of the condition required to claim the mark (e.g., player_interacts_with_mark).

reward_class_id.description: The class of reward associated with this mark.

reward_payload_ref.description: Reference to the actual reward payload definition.

is_optional.description: True if finding and claiming this mark is optional for progression.

is_discoverable.description: True if the mark provides sufficient hints for discovery.

claimed.description: True if the mark has been claimed.

can_mutate_if_unclaimed.description: True if this mark can change or be removed if not claimed in a run.

progression_break_risk.description: Risk level of this mark breaking player progression.
